# defectdojo_language_type (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Language Type

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_language_type" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) Color associated with the language
- `language` (String) The name of the language
